hero.title: Engineering Digital Transformation
hero.desc: Redefining the construction industry through innovative BIM and Digital Twin solutions.

hero.title: Precision Design, Smart Execution
hero.desc: Ensuring world-class ISO standards in the management of mega engineering projects.

hero.title: Smart Digital Infrastructure
hero.desc: Developing GIS solutions and Construction Intelligence to enhance asset sustainability.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Integrated Digital Solutions for the Construction Industry

items.title: Engineering Design Consultancy
items.description: Integrated design solutions (Architectural, Structural, MEP) fully based on BIM environments to ensure the highest levels of accuracy, coordination, and clash avoidance.

items.title: BIM & VDC Services
items.description: Management and coordination of Building Information Models, facilitating digital delivery for complex projects while ensuring quality according to international standards.

items.title: Enterprise Software Development
items.description: Designing and developing custom software solutions for the construction sector that help automate workflows and improve productivity using the latest technologies.

items.title: Construction Intelligence (KAI-INSIGHT)
items.description: Our innovative system for project data analysis, providing real-time dashboards to monitor progress and resources with high efficiency.

items.title: Digital Twin Solutions
items.description: Creating live digital copies of facilities that allow owners to manage assets and operate facilities intelligently, reducing long-term operational costs.

items.title: GIS & Infrastructure Consultancy
items.description: Providing advanced geographical mapping solutions, smart infrastructure network design, and landscape coordination for major projects.

items.title: Smart Asset Management
items.description: Linking BIM data with facility management systems to optimize the building's lifecycle and ensure proactive maintenance with efficiency and reliability.

items.title: Engineering Process Automation
items.description: Developing custom software tools (Plugins) for engineering programs to reduce human error and accelerate repetitive routine tasks.

items.title: Digital Training & Development
items.description: Qualifying engineering teams and training them on the latest digital transformation techniques, BIM tools, and teamwork in cloud environments.

aboutPage.title: About KAITECH
aboutPage.subtitle: Pioneers of Digital Transformation in Construction
aboutPage.story: KAITECH is a leading Egyptian firm specialized in providing integrated Digital Transformation services, merging deep engineering expertise with cutting-edge technology to enhance the efficiency of mega projects.

values.title: Digital Precision
values.desc: We fully adopt BIM-based solutions to ensure error-free execution and flawless coordination.

values.title: Technological Innovation
values.desc: Developing enterprise software and digital reality applications tailored for modern infrastructure.

values.title: Global Standards
values.desc: We are committed to international quality management standards, holding ISO 9001:2015 certification.

aboutFull.heroTitle: Architecting the Future with Today's Technology
aboutFull.detailedStory1: Since its inception, KAITECH has been dedicated to leading the shift in the engineering sector by adopting Building Information Modeling (BIM) methodologies. We don't just design; we manage the entire project lifecycle digitally to ensure maximum sustainability and coordination.
aboutFull.detailedStory2: Leveraging our experience in massive projects like 'The Point' in KSA and 'EIPICO 3' in Egypt, we integrate GIS and Digital Twin systems to provide real-time analytical insights that empower our partners to make informed decisions.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: A Proven Track Record of Digital Excellence

projectDetails.description: The {{projectName}} project was executed using advanced BIM methodology. We developed high-fidelity digital models (LOD 400/500) to ensure seamless coordination between architectural, structural, and MEP disciplines, significantly accelerating the construction timeline and optimizing operational costs.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.desc: We are here to help you turn your engineering vision into a digital reality.
